use_cases: Reusable button element for forms, navigation, and interactive UI
Primary action triggers with multiple visual variants
Versatile button component with variants for different contexts
ai_summary: A customizable button component with variants for primary, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Uses class-variance-authority for efficient style management and Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Includes disabled and focus-visible states with ring effects.
